summary: Verified dashboard stats fix - All stats now display correctly. Backend returns correct keys (active_clients, contracts_pending_signature, pending_invoices, upcoming_appointments) and frontend displays the values properly.

frontend_ui_tests.login_flow: PASS - Login works (requires JS click workaround for TouchableOpacity)

verified_fix_details.issue: Dashboard showed 0 for Active Clients and Pending Contracts even when data existed
verified_fix_details.root_cause: Backend returned wrong keys (pending_contracts -> contracts_pending_signature, unpaid_invoices -> pending_invoices) and active_clients status list didn't include 'Contract Sent'

fix_applied.backend/routes/doula.py: Changed keys to match frontend config and expanded active_statuses to include 'Contract Sent'
fix_applied.backend/routes/midwife.py: Same changes applied for midwife dashboard

verified_fix_details.verification: API returns correct values and UI displays them correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard stats fix is complete and verified. Login button requires JS click workaround due to React Native TouchableOpacity on web. All stats display correct values: Active Clients=1, Upcoming Appts=4, Pending Contracts=1, Pending Invoices=0.
known_issues: Login button click requires JavaScript evaluate workaround - TouchableOpacity doesn't respond to standard Playwright click on web
